Welcome to Andrew's page. My site is best viewed with Internet Explorer 5.0, 800x600, and a High or True color setting. You should also have a decent Internet Connection, because this site is filled javascript, and best of all, my artwork.

Site Map Coming Soon.
In the meantime, use this link to read up on my Japanese version of Zelda: Majoras Mask!

Note: Be sure you are able to view .art images.



All material on this exact webpage is © Copyright Andrew La Punta. That includes all Drawings and Images. Getting rich off one of my characters can end you up sued. If you have any Questions or Comments, you can always E-Mail me at SSJKrillin@aol.com.
